pages.text: 44 THE SOUTH AFRICAN INDIAN WHO’S WHO THE GOAN SOCIAL CLUB Established July 31, 1927 P.O. Box 4, LIMBE, Nyasaland HE membership now exceeds 75. The objects of the club are social and sport. While formed principally to serve the needs of the Goans, its membership is open to other sections of the community. It has a club room, library, hall, billiard room, tennis and badminton courts. The Indian Club, built on spacious grounds for sports, at Limbe, Nyasaland. SULIMAN ISMAIL MIA <.
